heroHeadline: Israeli Forces Fire Tear Gas Near Palestinian Schoolchildren in Masafer Yatta
heroSubtitle: Israeli military personnel discharged tear gas toward Palestinian children attempting to reach their school in Masafer Yatta, occupied West Bank, after authorities erected a fence blocking their route. Al Jazeera documented the confrontation on video.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
